inputs.label: Current Shares Outstanding
inputs.businessContext: Total number of shares currently outstanding before new issuance.

inputs.label: New Shares Issued
inputs.businessContext: Number of new shares to be issued in the current round.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify financial projections with actual data.

description.short: Calculate equity dilution percentage for existing shareholders.
description.long: Calculate equity dilution percentage for existing shareholders when new shares are issued. This tool shows the dilution effect on existing shareholders as a percentage of total shares after issuance.
